====Pokémon====
Bea keeps all of her Pokémon in [[Ultra Ball]]s.

{{anchor|Machamp 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Bea

|vajp=List of Japanese voice actors{{!}}Masaaki Ihara

|vajp2note=TW02
|desc={{p|Machamp}} is Bea's first known Pokémon. It was used in her battle in a Pokémon League tournament against [[Leon]], but lost to his {{TP|Leon|Charizard}}. It later trained alongside her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]].

It reappeared in ''[[TW03|Buddy]]'', where it was seen on television.

None of Machamp's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Bea
|pkmn=Machop
|type1=Fighting
|img=Bea Machop Twilight Wings.png
|epnum=TW02
|epname=Training
|vajp=Kiyotaka Furushima
|vaen=List of English voice actors{{!}}Laura Post
|desc={{p|Machop}} is Bea's second known Pokémon. It was seen training with her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]]. It is very caring towards her, such as when it handed out a chocolate bar to her when she was feeling down.

Machop appears again in ''[[TW08|The Gathering of Stars]]''.

None of Machop's moves are known.}}

|desc={{p|Machoke}} is Bea's third known Pokémon. It was seen training with her and her other Pokémon in the [[Wild Area]], though it was fairly fatigued every time they train.
